mapper.select: SELECT HOMEPAGE_ID, TERMS_IDX, TERMS_TYPE, TITLE, CONTENTS, USE_YN, DELETE_YN, ADD_ID, ADD_DATE, MODIFY_ID, MODIFY_DATE, (SELECT A.CODE_NAME FROM CMS_CODE A WHERE A.GROUP_ID = 'C0014' AND A.CODE_ID = CMS_TRAINING_TERMS.TERMS_TYPE) AS TERMS_TYPE_NAME FROM CMS_TRAINING_TERMS WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND DELETE_YN = 'N' AND TERMS_IDX = #{terms_idx} AND USE_YN = 'Y' AND TITLE IS NOT NULL AND CONTENTS IS NOT NULL
mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(terms_idx),0)+1 FROM CMS_TRAINING_TERMS
INSERT INTO CMS_TRAINING_TERMS ( HOMEPAGE_ID, TERMS_IDX, TERMS_TYPE, TITLE, CONTENTS, USE_YN, DELETE_YN, ADD_ID, ADD_DATE ) VALUES ( #{homepage_id}, #{terms_idx}, #{terms_type}, #{title}, #{contents}, #{use_yn}, 'N', #{add_id}, SYSDATE )
mapper.update: UPDATE CMS_TRAINING_TERMS SET TERMS_TYPE = #{terms_type}, TITLE = #{title}, CONTENTS = #{contents}, USE_YN = #{use_yn}, MODIFY_ID = #{modify_id}, MODIFY_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE HOMEPAGE_ID = #{homepage_id} AND TERMS_IDX = #{terms_idx}
